message:
feat(python): numpy.average wrapper parity (franken_numpy-yis9)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.average covering axis, weights,
returned, and keepdims. Test covers unweighted 1-D matching mean,
weighted 1-D, 2-D axis=0/1, returned=True yielding (avg, sum_weights)
tuple, equal-weights producing mean, and 2-D axis=1 with broadcast
row weights.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
